calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
TENTATIVE RULING: Grant without hearing.
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Continued To Feb-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Rowena Navia appeared for and with Carolyn York, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Navia stated that she was able to reach Troy York, that he thought he needed a court order for the listing agreement, that the real property is vacated now, and they will be moving forward with the listing, that he will not be charging any fees for listing the real property, and that they will need additional time to clean up the place.

The matter is continued to February 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
